summary: Parcel click bug fix verified. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirms: parcels render as polygon shapes (not circles), clicking parcels opens detail panel with score/surface/infrastructure info, no duplicate key React errors, BBox dynamic loading works (207 sites loaded), map flies to parcels on commune search.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/france/parcelles/bbox returns parcels with unique IDs (50 parcels, 0 duplicates)
Backend: /api/france/parcelles/commune/93078 returns parcels with unique IDs (8 parcels for Villepinte)
Backend: Parcel IDs use fr_ prefix with idu field (e.g., fr_93078000BA0187)
Backend: Parcels have geometry field with Polygon/MultiPolygon type
Backend: Parcels have score with verdict (GO/CONDITIONNEL/NO_GO)
Backend: Parcels have infrastructure distances (dist_poste_htb_m, dist_landing_point_km)
Backend: Commune search returns correct results for Villepinte (code 93078)
Backend: BBox endpoint respects limit parameter
Backend: BBox endpoint returns count field
Frontend: Searching Villepinte loads parcels AND map flies to their location
Frontend: At zoom >= 14, bbox dynamic loading fetches MORE parcels (207 sites loaded)
Frontend: Parcels render as visible polygon shapes (cyan/teal outlines) on dark map
Frontend: Clicking a parcel polygon opens the detail panel on the right
Frontend: Parcel detail panel shows score (53/100), surface (0.5 ha), infrastructure distances (HTB 0.5km, LP 152km), owner info
Frontend: No duplicate key React errors in console (0 errors)
Frontend: Status bar shows correct parcel count (207 sites)
seed_data_creation: No seed data - parcels fetched from API Carto IGN
context_for_next_testing_agent: Parcel click bug is FIXED. Key changes verified: 1) parcel_id uses idu field from API Carto (fr_93078000BA0187 format), 2) Parcels render as LeafletPolygon with cyan outlines, 3) FlyToParcels component centers map on loaded parcels, 4) BBox loading triggers at zoom>=14 with 600ms debounce. Test commune: Villepinte (93078) loads 8 initial parcels, then 207 via BBox.

bug_fix_verification.root_cause_1_duplicate_keys: FIXED - parcel_id now uses idu field, all IDs unique
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_2_distance_filter: FIXED - parcels load correctly within reasonable distances
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_3_circle_markers: FIXED - parcels render as LeafletPolygon shapes, not CircleMarker
